name: Make Merits in Another World
short_description: You are forced to become the savior of the world, and go to another world to kill the devil! But at the beginning of your reincarnation in this other world, you turned out to be just a piece of grass...
detailed_description:
About Us




Bandaid Studio QQ Group：570920662
Xiaohongshu：创可贴Studio
BiliBili：创可贴Studio
Sina Weibo：创可贴_Studio



∞ ou are just an ordinary office worker, but you are dragged into another world by a “God” and forced to become the savior of the world, being asked to destroy the devil in the other world!
After you were thrown into another world by the gods and reincarnated, you found that you were just a piece of grass!
The wild boar mercilessly eats you, causing your death. Only when you see the “God” again do you learn that the power of your reincarnated identity is determined by your merits.
Only by constantly doing good deeds and accumulating merits can you be reincarnated and obtain a powerful identity and finally kill the devil!
As you accumulate merit and become stronger step by step, the truth behind this world is gradually revealed...



∞ Approximately 1-2 hours to achieve all endings
∞ Reincarnation in another world & Earn Cyber-merits
∞ Original story with over 200 hand-drawn illustrations
∞ Customised medieval-style soundtracks
∞ Various endings，funny and relaxing at the beginning，unexpected twists and turns later on
∞ Play many interesting identities



∞ Production/Script：兔子
∞ Script Assistance：Eurus、RaspberryJam
∞ CG/UI/Promotion：Eurus
∞ Sountracks：yy、一鹏 Waveaudio
